title: Dénonciation de la convention

pages.text:
=..

•

10/0/05

No. 212

Office of the British Representative with the French Committee of National Liberation,

Algiers.

16th June, 1944.

Your Excellency,

With reference to Your Excellency's note

No. 2106/266 of the 20th March, and in accordance with.

instructions fron His Majosty' a Principal Secretary of State for Foreign Affaira, I have the honour to notify to

Your Excellency the denunciation by His Majesty's Government in the United Kingdom of Groat Britain and Northern Ireland of the Convention relating to International Ixhibitions, signed in

Paris on the 22ad November, 1928.

2.

In accordance with the provisions of Article 37 of the

Convention the present notilication will take effoct one year from the date of receipt of the present notification.

3. I shall be grateful if you will be so good as to acknowledge the receipt of this comunication.

I have the honour to be, with the highest consideration,

Six,

Your Excellency's most obedient Servant,

His Excellency

Monsieur Ronó Na381811,

Commissioner for Foreign Affairs.

Adrian Holman.
